error_signature: Unexpected response from Salesforce bulk API
title: Incorrect URL for Salesforce Bulk API
symptom: The response from the Salesforce bulk API does not match the expected format, returning an empty records array instead.
not_this_if: Using the correct API endpoint URL
root_cause: The user was using an incorrect URL format for the Salesforce Bulk API, which led to receiving an unexpected response. The correct endpoint must be used to access the API properly.
fix_steps: Change the API endpoint URL from 'https://MyDomain.sandbox.lightning.force.com/services/data/v64.0/jobs/ingest/' to 'https://MyDomain.sandbox.my.salesforce.com/services/data/v64.0/jobs/ingest/'
Retry the HTTP POST request with the updated URL.
agent_instruction: Update the Salesforce Bulk API URL to the correct format and retry the request.
